tutorials.title: Prelude
tutorials.description: A first feel for wq and its expression-oriented style.

tutorials.title: Bindings
tutorials.description: Bind names to values and reuse them across expressions.

tutorials.title: Arithmetic
tutorials.description: Learn numeric operators, precedence, and elementwise math.

tutorials.title: Lists
tutorials.description: Work with wq's central collection type, from indexing to slicing.

tutorials.title: Dicts
tutorials.description: Store named data with symbol keys and nested values.

tutorials.title: Conditionals
tutorials.description: Choose branches with ternary, guard, and chain expressions.

tutorials.title: Loops
tutorials.description: Repeat work with three styles of loops.

tutorials.title: Functions
tutorials.description: Package expressions into reusable functions and closures.

tutorials.title: Higher-Order Bfns
tutorials.description: Transform lists with bfns like filter, map, fold, and scan.

tutorials.title: Errors
tutorials.description: See how wq raises errors and turns them into values with `@t`.

tutorials.title: Coda
tutorials.description: Wrap up the main ideas and pick the next direction to explore.

tutorials.title: Installation
tutorials.description: Try out the web build or install the native CLI.

tutorials.title: Markdown test
tutorials.description: A formatting check page covering headings, lists, links, and tables.
